steps.title: Set up the division
steps.content: With at least 8 square feet required per person and a total room size of 5,400 square feet, the maximum number of people is found by dividing: maximum people = total area ÷ area per person.

steps.title: Calculate the maximum number
steps.content: $$\frac{5,400}{8} = 675$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
